isolation.note: Used only the audit instance on port 3100 with one named browser session. The failed validation branch was exercised on the same audit instance by submitting an invalid codex command through the onboarding test-environment request.

assertions.title: Fresh isolated instance reports healthy API

steps.action: GET /api/health on the fresh audit instance before any company exists

assertions.title: Empty instance opens the first-company onboarding flow

steps.action: Open http://127.0.0.1:3100 on the fresh zero-company instance
steps.expected: The board opens first-company onboarding instead of a blank or broken dashboard
steps.observed: The app routed to /onboarding with the Company step visible and later steps disabled

steps.action: Inspect browser errors on the onboarding entry state

evidence.network: Initial browser load landed on http://127.0.0.1:3100/onboarding

assertions.title: Onboarding with codex_local creates an audit-ready company

steps.action: Create the first company from onboarding step 1
steps.expected: A company is created and the wizard advances to the agent step
steps.observed: Created company 'Round2 Audit Demo Company' with prefix ROU

steps.action: Select codex_local and confirm the environment check can pass
steps.expected: The UI shows a successful codex_local readiness result before agent creation
steps.observed: The audit instance showed a visible 'Passed' readiness state for codex_local

steps.action: Continue onboarding through agent creation and open the seeded issue
steps.expected: The first company, first agent, and starter issue are created and the operator lands in a usable company-scoped state
steps.observed: Created company 6b09a705-2900-4a52-86ba-4d6e2ce170a8, agent CEO (ada8be00-7385-442b-853a-494701de3052), and issue ROU-1 (14ad1ece-c42e-41d7-b5e6-b7f4fa481896), then landed on /ROU/issues/ROU-1 with working company navigation

assertions.title: codex_local readiness is visible before the audit starts

steps.action: POST /api/companies/6b09a705-2900-4a52-86ba-4d6e2ce170a8/adapters/codex_local/test-environment with {"adapterConfig":{}} before relying on the adapter
steps.expected: HTTP 200 response with a passing codex_local environment result
Checks confirm cwd, command resolution, auth, and hello probe success
steps.observed: Returned codex_cwd_valid, codex_command_resolvable, codex_openai_api_key_present, and codex_hello_probe_passed

assertions.title: Failed adapter validation blocks onboarding progression

steps.action: From the agent step, exercise a real failing codex_local test-environment request on the audit instance
steps.expected: The onboarding environment check returns a failed result
steps.observed: Submitted the same onboarding request with adapterConfig.command=definitely-not-a-real-codex-binary, and the backend returned a visible failure: 'Command not found in PATH'

steps.action: Inspect onboarding progression after the failed validation
steps.expected: Onboarding does not create an agent and does not advance misleadingly
steps.observed: The wizard stayed on /onboarding, Next was disabled, and Task/Launch remained inaccessible

steps.action: Query the company agent list after the failed validation
steps.expected: No agent record is created from the failed attempt

assertions.title: Onboarding launch starts the seeded company loop

steps.action: Finish onboarding and click Create & Open Issue
steps.expected: The seeded issue enters the normal company execution loop and shows queued or running work
steps.observed: The UI opened /ROU/issues/ROU-1 and immediately showed a Live run card for run ae9f020c-56a0-4dbc-bf0d-ead72dc967fc in running state

steps.action: Inspect the seeded issue and related run evidence after launch
steps.expected: The created company surfaces linked issue/run state for the seeded work
steps.observed: Issue ROU-1 now carries checkoutRunId/executionRunId ae9f020c-56a0-4dbc-bf0d-ead72dc967fc and the company heartbeat-runs feed shows the onboarding_launch assignment run for CEO

frictions.description: Because the audit instance on port 3100 had a healthy codex_local environment, exercising the failing onboarding branch required submitting the onboarding test-environment request with an invalid codex command from the same browser session instead of using the off-limits precompany instance on port 3101.
frictions.resolution: Injected adapterConfig.command=definitely-not-a-real-codex-binary only for the failed-validation request, confirmed the UI blocked progression and no agent was created, then restored the normal request path and reran the real passing check.

frictions.description: The launch-created run became visible as running in the UI immediately after Create & Open Issue, but it reconciled to a failed/orphaned run within seconds, so the later /api/issues/:issueId/active-run probe returned null even though the issue retained the linked execution run id.

summary: Tested 6 assigned onboarding assertions on the audit instance at port 3100: all 6 passed. The instance started healthy with zero companies; onboarding opened correctly; the failure branch blocked progression without creating an agent; the passing codex_local path created company ROU, CEO, and issue ROU-1; the readiness endpoint passed; and launch created visible run activity plus linked run evidence for run ae9f020c-56a0-4dbc-bf0d-ead72dc967fc.
